title: Hinds County Pauper's Field Case Files

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Mississippi Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am writing to formally request access to public records under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). Specifically, I am requesting any and all records and materials related to the cases of Dexter Wade, Marrio Moore, and Jonathan David Hankins.

Links: 
DW: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/bettersten-wade-dexter-jackson-mississippi-police-missing-rcna121697
MM: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/marrio-moore-buried-police-dexter-wade-jackson-mississippi-rcna125540
JDH: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/jonathan-david-hankins-missing-buried-jackson-mississippi-rcna128735
Description: Approximately 330 people have been buried at the Hinds Co. Paupers’ Cemetery since 2008. Many without notifying their family. These are three of the cases.

State: Mississippi
Law Enforcement: Jackson police

Documents:
Incident reports
Missing person reports
Accident investigations
Investigation reports
Officer statements
Witness statements
NCIC searches/inputs
Coroner communications
Next of kin communications
Any other relevant case files

Footage:
Any footage collected as evidence or during the investigation

Audio:
911 calls
Police radio communications
Any other audio recordings related to the case

Visual Media:
Crime scene photographs
Surveillance stills
Photographs taken during the investigation

Court Records:
Transcripts from court hearings or proceedings
Any video/audio footage from court hearings
Court orders or any other court-related documents

Please include any and all materials, regardless of format (digital or physical), including those not listed above that are related to the cases in question. Additionally, if this request has been sent to the wrong department or agency, I would appreciate it if you could provide guidance or contact information for the correct department or agency that handles such requests. If any part of the request is denied or redacted, please provide a detailed explanation of the specific legal exemption that applies.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Emilee Pence

title: Port Allen ICE detention communication (City Council)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Louisiana Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Under the Louisiana Open Records Act, I am requesting an opportunity to obtain copies of public records relating to the property located at 2070 Commercial Dr, Port Allen, LA 70767.
Specifically, I am requesting the following records created, submitted, or received between January 1, 2025 and the date this request is processed:

All emails, text messages, memos, and calendar appointments sent or received by [Insert Specific Official's Name or "the Mayor's Office"] containing any of the following keywords: "ICE", "Immigration and Customs Enforcement", "DHS", "Homeland Security", "detention", "processing center", or "[Insert specific LLC name or address]".
Minutes, transcripts, agendas, and notes from any open, closed-door, or executive sessions where the sale, lease, or zoning of the aforementioned property was discussed.

To expedite this request and reduce the administrative burden on your office, I am requesting these records in their native electronic format (e.g., PDF for documents, .PST or .EML for emails) delivered via email or secure download link.
If any part of this request is denied or redacted, please provide a written response citing the specific statutory exemption being applied.
If there are any fees for searching or copying these records, please inform me beforehand if the estimated cost will exceed $25. However, I also request a waiver of all fees, as the disclosure of this information is in the public interest and will contribute significantly to the public’s understanding of local government operations and infrastructure planning.
Thank you for your prompt assistance and public service.
Sincerely,

Ricky Harrershow

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Harrershow
